expectations.evidence: Security, test-health, and config-drift have zero dependencies but run one-at-a-time
Steps 1-3 are mechanical read-only analysis — use Sonnet/Haiku or read-only agent types
Opus is for orchestration and the ADR synthesis only
Launch three parallel agents, wait for all, then run synthesis+ADR (Opus)

notes: Strong baseline. Only miss is output format. Content nearly identical to skill — CLAUDE.md already encodes tier rules.
